step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows the ZONNIC logo in navy blue, with a mint/teal halo circle around the C. The background is solid white, and there is no regulatory or additional text. The logo is centered left and uses bold sans-serif typography.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows the ZONNIC logo in navy blue, with a mint/teal halo circle around the C. The background is solid white, and there is no regulatory or additional text. The logo is centered left and uses bold sans-serif typography.
CONTENT TYPE: logo_only

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center left
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: YES
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: #89d0c8 (mint/teal, matches Grey/Neutral secondary light palette)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: #89d0c8
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Description: solid white background

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: NOT PRESENT ⚠

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: NOT PRESENT

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, mint/teal, white
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: used as accent (halo around C)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image displays the ZONNIC logo in navy blue text, positioned center left on a solid white background. The logo features a mint/teal circular halo around the C, which is correctly placed and proportioned. The logo text is bold and sans-serif, matching brand standards, and the secondary colour is used as an accent for the halo. However, the halo around the C is a solid colour rather than a gradient, which is required for white backgrounds. There are no regulatory elements present, such as the nicotine warning, 18+ icon, or risk communication text. The logo is visually clear and uses the correct colours, but the missing regulatory elements and the incorrect halo treatment need to be addressed for full compliance. Overall, the image follows most brand standards but requires minor and critical corrections.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
No 18+ age restriction icon is present in the image.
No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo is present and correctly positioned.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
Halo around the C is a solid colour instead of a gradient, which is required on white backgrounds.
Logo is distorted or modified, which is not allowed.
Background is solid white, which matches the logo requirements.
No gradient background is present, so gradient direction and split rules do not apply.
Logo-only content on white background is acceptable for brand visuals.
Only approved brand colours are used; halo matches Grey/Neutral palette.
Bold sans-serif font is used, matching Santral style. No NRT lockup text present.
No grey gradient background is used, so these rules do not apply.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it.
Halo does not blend into background, flavour matches, and logo is not placed in any shape.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required bilingual nicotine warning statement at the top of the image.
violations.evidence: No warning text visible in the image.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ age restriction icon is present in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.
violations.evidence: No age icon visible in the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.
violations.evidence: No risk text visible in the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top and risk communication plus 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No regulatory elements visible in the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top.
violations.evidence: No warning text visible in the image.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: Halo around the C is a solid colour instead of a gradient, which is required on white backgrounds.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the C halo to a gradient using both the primary and secondary colours from the flavour palette.
violations.evidence: Halo is mint/teal solid, not a gradient.

violations.rule_text: The logo should never be altered or recreated in any way.
violations.issue: Logo is distorted or modified, which is not allowed.
violations.fix_suggestion: Use the official, unmodified ZONNIC logo asset.
violations.evidence: Brand detection flagged logo as distorted or modified.
